title: NoTollBreak
description: 🛡️ No Tool Break: Your insurance for tools & armor. Real-time durability alerts, custom UI & colors. Never lose your Netherite gear again! Requires Fabric.
body:
# 🛡️ No Tool Break

Have you ever lost your favorite Efficiency V Netherite pickaxe? **No Tool Break** is your ultimate insurance policy. This lightweight **Fabric** mod ensures you never hear that heartbreaking tool-breaking sound again.

## ✨ Key Features
* **⚠️ Smart Alerts:** The mod tracks the durability of your items in real-time.
* **🚫 Loss Prevention:** Receive instant notifications before your tool vanishes.
* **🛠️ Universal Support:** Works with Tools, Armor & Elytra.
* **🎨 Fully Customizable:** Adjust settings via an in-game menu.

## ⚙️ Configuration
The intuitive interface allows you to:
* **📏 Calibration:** Set custom durability thresholds.
* **🎨 Visuals:** Choose alert colors and display modes.
* **🛡️ Profiles:** Separate settings for Tools and Armor.

## 📥 Requirements
* **📍 Loader:** Fabric 🛠️
* **📍 Dependencies:** Requires **Fabric API**.
